title: Channels
excerpt: Channels connect ResearchClaw to messaging platforms so the same agent can be reached from multiple entry points. | Channel | Notes | | ---------- | ---------------------------- | | console | Built-in web console channel | | telegram | Telegram bot | | discord | Discord bot | | dingtalk | DingTalk bot | | feishu | Feishu bot | | qq | QQ channel integration | | imessage | macOS-only local deployment | | voice | Twilio voice channel | bash researchclaw channels config researchclaw channels list Channel config lives under channels in ~/.researchclaw/config.json: json { "channels": { "console": { "enabled": true, "botprefix": "[BOT] " }, "dingtalk": { "enabled": true, "clientid": "your-client-id", "clientsecret": "your-client-secret", "botprefix": "[BOT] " }, "available": ["console", "dingtalk

title: 频道配置
excerpt: 频道用于把同一个 ResearchClaw Agent 接入多个消息入口。 | 频道 | 说明 | | ---------- | --------------------- | | console | 内置 Web 控制台频道 | | telegram | Telegram Bot | | discord | Discord Bot | | dingtalk | 钉钉机器人 | | feishu | 飞书机器人 | | qq | QQ 频道集成 | | imessage | 仅支持 macOS 本地部署 | | voice | Twilio 语音频道 | bash researchclaw channels config researchclaw channels list 频道配置位于 ~/.researchclaw/config.json 的 channels 字段： json { "channels": { "console": { "enabled": true, "botprefix": "[BOT] " }, "dingtalk": { "enabled": true, "clientid": "your-client-id", "clientsecret": "your-client-secret", "botprefix": "[BOT] " }, "available": ["console", "dingtalk"] } } 可以通过 channelaccounts 配置同一频道的多个账号实例。 运行时会将账号实例化为 channel:accountid 形式。 json { "channels": { "telegram": { "enabled": true, "botprefix": "[BOT] " }, "available": ["conso

title: CLI
excerpt: ResearchClaw provides a command-line interface for setup, runtime, and operations. bash researchclaw [global-options] <command> [sub-command/options] | Option | Description | | ------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------- | | --host | Default API host used by CLI commands that call the running service | | --port | Default API port used by CLI commands that call the running service | | --version | Show version | | -h, --help | Show help | | Command | Purpose | | ----------- | ----------------------------------------- | | init | Initialize workspace and bootstrap files | | app | Run the FastAPI service | | models | Manage model providers and local models | | channels | Manage channel configuration | | env | Manage persisted environment variables | | skil

title: CLI 命令行
excerpt: ResearchClaw 提供用于初始化、运行和运维的命令行接口。 bash researchclaw [全局选项] <命令> [子命令/参数] | 选项 | 说明 | | ------------ | ---------------------------------------- | | --host | 供 CLI 访问服务 API 时使用的默认主机地址 | | --port | 供 CLI 访问服务 API 时使用的默认端口 | | --version | 查看版本 | | -h, --help | 查看帮助 | | 命令 | 作用 | | ----------- | ---------------------------- | | init | 初始化工作目录和引导文件 | | app | 启动 FastAPI 服务 | | models | 管理模型提供商和本地模型 | | channels | 管理频道配置 | | env | 管理持久化环境变量 | | skills | 查看/配置技能启用状态 | | cron | 通过 HTTP API 管理定时任务 | | daemon | 运行态管理（状态/重启/日志） | | papers | 检索与管理论文 | | chats | 通过 HTTP API 管理会话 | | clean | 清理工作目录 | | uninstall | 卸载本地运行环境与命令包装 | bash researchclaw init --defaults --accept-security researchclaw app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8088 researchclaw models list researchclaw channels list researchclaw env set OPENAIAPI

title: Chat Commands
excerpt: ResearchClaw supports slash commands inside chat messages. | Command | Description | | ----------------------- | -------------------------------- | | /new or /start | Start a new session | | /compact | Compact conversation memory | | /clear | Clear history and summaries | | /history | Show conversation statistics | | /papers | List recently discussed papers | | /refs | Show reference library summary | | /skills | List active skills | | /skills debug [query] | Show skill routing debug details | | /compactstr | Show current compact summary | | /daemon status | Show runtime daemon status | | /daemon logs [n] | Show daemon logs | | /help | Show command help | Type slash commands directly in any conversation: text /help /skills /skills debug summarize arxiv papers this week - Unknown slash comm

title: 对话命令
excerpt: ResearchClaw 支持在对话中使用斜杠命令（slash commands）。 | 命令 | 说明 | | ----------------------- | -------------------- | | /new 或 /start | 新建会话 | | /compact | 压缩对话记忆 | | /clear | 清空历史与摘要 | | /history | 查看会话统计 | | /papers | 查看最近讨论论文 | | /refs | 查看文献库概览 | | /skills | 查看已启用技能 | | /skills debug [query] | 查看技能路由调试信息 | | /compactstr | 查看当前压缩摘要 | | /daemon status | 查看运行状态 | | /daemon logs [n] | 查看 daemon 日志 | | /help | 查看命令帮助 | 在任意会话中直接输入： text /help /skills /skills debug summarize arxiv papers this week - 未识别的 slash 命令会回退到自然语言处理。 - /daemon restart 在对话路径中受限，建议使用 CLI 执行。

title: Community
excerpt: Welcome to the ResearchClaw community! - Repository — Source code, Issues, Pull Requests - Submit Issues to report bugs or suggest features - Submit Pull Requests to contribute code - GitHub Discussions — Ask questions, share experiences, discuss features - Share your custom Skills with the community We are committed to fostering a friendly, inclusive community. When participating: - Be respectful - Communicate kindly - Stay focused on technical discussion - Help newcomers get started Want to contribute code? See the Contributing Guide.

title: 社区
excerpt: 欢迎加入 ResearchClaw 社区！ - 项目仓库 — 源码、Issues、Pull Requests - 提交 Issue 报告 Bug 或提出功能建议 - 提交 Pull Request 贡献代码 - GitHub Discussions — 提问、分享经验、讨论功能 - 分享你开发的自定义 Skills 我们致力于营造友好、包容的社区环境。参与社区时请： - 尊重他人 - 友善沟通 - 聚焦技术讨论 - 帮助新成员融入 想要贡献代码？请参阅 贡献指南。

title: Compact (Conversation Compression)
excerpt: When conversation history becomes too long, the Compact mechanism automatically compresses old messages, retaining key information while saving context window space. 1. When message count or token count exceeds the threshold, Compact is triggered 2. The system uses the LLM to summarize old messages 3. The summary replaces original messages, freeing context space 4. New messages continue to accumulate in the compressed context Configure Compact parameters in config.yaml: yaml memory: compact: enabled: true maxmessages: 50 summaryprompt: "Summarize the key points of the conversation above" You can also manually trigger compression in chat: /compact - Compact calls the LLM to generate summaries, incurring additional API costs - Compressed summaries may lose some detail - Adjust thresholds bas

title: Compact 对话压缩
excerpt: 当对话历史过长时，Compact 机制会自动压缩旧消息，保留关键信息同时节省上下文窗口空间。 1. 当消息数量或 Token 数超过阈值时，触发 Compact 2. 系统使用 LLM 对旧消息进行摘要 3. 摘要替换原始消息，释放上下文空间 4. 新消息继续在压缩后的上下文中积累 在 config.yaml 中配置 Compact 参数： yaml memory: compact: enabled: true maxmessages: 50 summaryprompt: "请总结以上对话的关键内容" 你也可以在对话中手动触发压缩： /compact - Compact 会调用 LLM 生成摘要，产生额外的 API 费用 - 压缩后的摘要可能丢失部分细节信息 - 建议根据使用场景调整阈值

title: Configuration & Working Directory
excerpt: ResearchClaw keeps runtime data in a workspace directory and secrets in a separate secret directory. - Working directory: ~/.researchclaw - Secret directory: ~/.researchclaw.secret You can override both with environment variables: - RESEARCHCLAWWORKINGDIR - RESEARCHCLAWSECRETDIR text ~/.researchclaw/ ├── config.json Main runtime config ├── jobs.json Persistent cron jobs ├── chats.json Chat/session history ├── PROFILE.md User/research profile ├── HEARTBEAT.md Heartbeat checklist ├── activeskills/ Enabled skills ├── customizedskills/ Local custom skills ├── papers/ Cached/downloaded papers ├── references/ References/BibTeX related data ├── experiments/ Experiment tracking data ├── memory/ Memory artifacts └── researchclaw.log Runtime logs text ~/.researchclaw.secret/ ├── envs.json Persisted

title: 配置与工作目录

headings.text: 与部署相关的环境变量
headings.id: 与部署相关的环境变量

excerpt: ResearchClaw 将运行数据与密钥数据分目录存储。 - 工作目录：~/.researchclaw - 密钥目录：~/.researchclaw.secret 可通过环境变量覆盖： - RESEARCHCLAWWORKINGDIR - RESEARCHCLAWSECRETDIR text ~/.researchclaw/ ├── config.json 主配置 ├── jobs.json 持久化 cron 任务 ├── chats.json 会话历史 ├── PROFILE.md 用户/研究画像 ├── HEARTBEAT.md 心跳检查清单 ├── activeskills/ 已启用技能 ├── customizedskills/ 本地自定义技能 ├── papers/ 论文缓存 ├── references/ 文献/BibTeX 数据 ├── experiments/ 实验追踪数据 ├── memory/ 记忆数据 └── researchclaw.log 运行日志 text ~/.researchclaw.secret/ ├── envs.json 持久化环境变量 └── providers.json 模型提供商配置 json { "language": "zh", "showtooldetails": true, "channels": { "console": { "enabled": true, "botprefix": "[BOT] " }, "dingtalk": { "enabled": false }, "feishu": { "enabled": false }, "available": ["console"] }, "channelaccounts": { "telegram": { "lab": { "enabled": true, "bo

title: Console
excerpt: ResearchClaw includes a built-in web console for day-to-day operations. After service startup, open http://<host>:<port> (default http://127.0.0.1:8088). - Talk with the Scholar agent - Manage multi-session conversations - Review message history - Configure model providers and models - Manage channel enablement and credentials - Manage persisted environment variables - Manage skills (enable/disable) - Runtime health and uptime - Model usage metrics (requests / success / fallback / token estimate) - Channel runtime queue/worker stats - Cron runtime stats - Automation run statistics (queued/running/succeeded/failed) - Agent list and session observability - GET /api/control/status - GET /api/control/usage - GET /api/control/channels/runtime - GET /api/control/automation/runs - GET /api/contro

title: 控制台
excerpt: ResearchClaw 内置 Web 控制台，用于日常使用与运维观测。 服务启动后访问 http://<host>:<port>（默认 http://127.0.0.1:8088）。 - 与 Scholar 助手对话 - 多会话管理 - 查看历史消息 - 配置模型提供商与模型 - 管理频道开关与凭证 - 管理持久化环境变量 - 管理技能（启用/禁用） - 运行健康状态与 uptime - 模型用量指标（请求数/成功率/回退次数/token 估算） - 频道队列/worker 运行指标 - cron 运行指标 - 自动化任务统计（queued/running/succeeded/failed） - Agent 列表与会话可观测 - GET /api/control/status - GET /api/control/usage - GET /api/control/channels/runtime - GET /api/control/automation/runs - GET /api/control/agents - GET /api/control/sessions - POST /api/control/reload 生产部署访问建议请参考 部署指南。

title: Contributing
excerpt: Thank you for your interest in contributing to ResearchClaw! bash git clone https://github.com/MingxinYang/ResearchClaw.git cd ResearchClaw python -m venv .venv source .venv/bin/activate pip install -e ".[dev]" bash cd console npm install npm run dev bash cd website npm install npm run dev 1. Fork the repository 2. Create a feature branch: git checkout -b feature/my-feature 3. Commit changes: git commit -m "feat: add my feature" 4. Push branch: git push origin feature/my-feature 5. Create a Pull Request - Python code follows PEP 8 - TypeScript code uses ESLint + Prettier - Commit messages follow Conventional Commits To develop custom Skills: 1. See Skills documentation for skill structure 2. Create a new skill in the skills/ directory 3. Write skill.json and handler logic 4. Test thoroughl

title: 贡献指南
excerpt: 感谢你对 ResearchClaw 的贡献兴趣！ bash git clone https://github.com/MingxinYang/ResearchClaw.git cd ResearchClaw python -m venv .venv source .venv/bin/activate pip install -e ".[dev]" bash cd console npm install npm run dev bash cd website npm install npm run dev 1. Fork 仓库 2. 创建特性分支：git checkout -b feature/my-feature 3. 提交修改：git commit -m "feat: add my feature" 4. 推送分支：git push origin feature/my-feature 5. 创建 Pull Request - Python 代码遵循 PEP 8 - TypeScript 代码使用 ESLint + Prettier - Commit 信息遵循 Conventional Commits 规范 开发自定义 Skill： 1. 参考 Skills 文档 了解 Skill 结构 2. 在 skills/ 目录下创建新 Skill 3. 编写 skill.json 和处理逻辑 4. 测试确保功能正常 5. 提交 PR 或发布到独立仓库 - 使用 GitHub Issues 报告 Bug - 提供复现步骤和环境信息 - 附上相关的日志输出

title: Deployment

headings.text: 2) Set runtime env and start service

excerpt: This page explains a practical deployment path for ResearchClaw with clear defaults. - Single machine (recommended): one process, local disk persistence, reverse proxy in front. - Containerized: build your own image from deploy/Dockerfile. - Python 3.10+ - A configured model provider (researchclaw models ...) - Persistent disk paths for workspace and secrets | Variable | Required | Purpose | | ------------------------------- | -------------------- | -------------------------------------------------- | | RESEARCHCLAWWORKINGDIR | Yes | Workspace data (config.json, chats, jobs, files) | | RESEARCHCLAWSECRETDIR | Yes | Secrets store (envs.json, providers.json) | | RESEARCHCLAWHOST | Recommended | Bind host (set 0.0.0.0 on servers) | | RESEARCHCLAWPORT | Recommended | Service port (default 8088

title: 部署指南

headings.text: 反向代理（Nginx 最小示例）

excerpt: 本文提供一套可直接落地的 ResearchClaw 部署路径。 - 单机部署（推荐）：单进程 + 本地持久化 + 反向代理。 - 容器部署：基于仓库内 deploy/Dockerfile 自建镜像。 - Python 3.10+ - 已配置至少一个模型提供商（researchclaw models ...） - 预留持久化目录（工作目录与密钥目录） | 变量 | 是否必需 | 作用 | | ------------------------------- | -------- | ------------------------------------------- | | RESEARCHCLAWWORKINGDIR | 是 | 工作数据（config.json、聊天、任务、文件） | | RESEARCHCLAWSECRETDIR | 是 | 密钥数据（envs.json、providers.json） | | RESEARCHCLAWHOST | 建议 | 绑定地址（服务器建议 0.0.0.0） | | RESEARCHCLAWPORT | 建议 | 服务端口（默认 8088） | | RESEARCHCLAWAUTOMATIONTOKEN | 强烈建议 | 保护 /api/automation/triggers/ | | RESEARCHCLAWCORSORIGINS | 可选 | 逗号分隔的 CORS 白名单 | bash pip install -e ".[dev]" researchclaw init --defaults --accept-security researchclaw models config bash export RESEARCHCLAWWORKINGDIR=/data/researchclaw export RESEARCHCLAWSEC

title: FAQ
excerpt: <details> <summary>What model providers are supported?</summary> ResearchClaw supports OpenAI, Anthropic, DashScope, DeepSeek, Ollama, and custom OpenAI-compatible providers. </details> <details> <summary>Where is my data stored?</summary> By default: - Workspace data: ~/.researchclaw - Secret data (envs/providers): ~/.researchclaw.secret </details> <details> <summary>Can I deploy ResearchClaw on a server?</summary> Yes. Use either: - single-machine deployment with researchclaw app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8088 - Docker self-build from deploy/Dockerfile See full steps in Deployment. </details> <details> <summary>How do I secure automation triggers?</summary> Set RESEARCHCLAWAUTOMATIONTOKEN on the server and pass the same token via Authorization: Bearer <token> (or x-researchclaw-token). </det

title: 常见问题（FAQ）
excerpt: <details> <summary>支持哪些模型提供商？</summary> 支持 OpenAI、Anthropic、DashScope、DeepSeek、Ollama，以及自定义 OpenAI 兼容提供商。 </details> <details> <summary>数据默认存储在哪里？</summary> 默认分为两部分： - 工作数据：~/.researchclaw - 密钥数据（环境变量/模型提供商）：~/.researchclaw.secret </details> <details> <summary>可以部署到服务器吗？</summary> 可以。你可以选择： - 单机部署：researchclaw app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8088 - Docker 自建镜像：使用仓库内 deploy/Dockerfile 完整步骤见 部署指南。 </details> <details> <summary>自动化触发接口怎么做鉴权？</summary> 在服务端设置 RESEARCHCLAWAUTOMATIONTOKEN，请求侧通过 Authorization: Bearer <token>（或 x-researchclaw-token）携带相同 token。 </details> <details> <summary>为什么访问 / 提示 "Console not found"？</summary> 后端可在无前端构建产物时启动。请执行： bash cd console npm install npm run build </details> <details> <summary>频道配置后无法连通，怎么排查？</summary> 1. 核对平台凭证。 2. 检查机器人权限和回调/webhook 配置。 3. 确认服务网络可访问平台 API。

title: Heartbeat
excerpt: Heartbeat is the periodic scheduler loop used by ResearchClaw for proactive tasks. - Skill cron prompts (when configured in skills) - Built-in periodic checks - Delivery to configured channels Heartbeat settings are read from config.json (with legacy fallback): json { "agents": { "defaults": { "heartbeat": { "enabled": true, "every": "30m", "target": "last" } } } } Also available via env defaults: - RESEARCHCLAWHEARTBEATENABLED - RESEARCHCLAWHEARTBEATINTERVAL (minutes) - Keep interval practical (for example 30m or 1h). - Ensure at least one dispatch channel is available for proactive messages. - Use /api/control/status to inspect cron/heartbeat runtime state.

title: Heartbeat 心跳
excerpt: Heartbeat 是 ResearchClaw 的周期调度机制，用于执行主动任务。 - 执行技能中配置的 cron prompt - 执行内置周期任务 - 向已配置频道进行主动投递 心跳配置来自 config.json（并兼容旧字段回退）： json { "agents": { "defaults": { "heartbeat": { "enabled": true, "every": "30m", "target": "last" } } } } 也可通过环境变量设置默认值： - RESEARCHCLAWHEARTBEATENABLED - RESEARCHCLAWHEARTBEATINTERVAL（分钟） - 心跳间隔建议设为 30m 或 1h 这类实用值。 - 主动消息投递需保证至少有一个可用频道。 - 通过 /api/control/status 观察 cron/heartbeat 运行状态。

title: Introduction
excerpt: ResearchClaw is an AI research assistant focused on paper workflows, experiment tracking, and multi-channel collaboration. - Paper search and tracking (ArXiv, Semantic Scholar, etc.) - Reference and BibTeX workflows - Summarization and research-note memory - Experiment logging and periodic reminders - Multi-channel delivery and automation triggers - Agent runtime: Scholar agent + tool/skill orchestration - Control plane: status, sessions, cron, and automation run observability - Channel layer: console + external messaging platforms - Workspace model: local working dir plus separate secret dir bash researchclaw init --defaults --accept-security researchclaw models config researchclaw app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8088 Then open http://127.0.0.1:8088. - Quick Start - Deployment - Config & Work

title: 项目介绍
excerpt: ResearchClaw 是面向科研工作流的 AI 助手，聚焦论文检索、实验追踪和多渠道协作。 - 论文检索与追踪（ArXiv、Semantic Scholar 等） - 文献管理与 BibTeX 工作流 - 论文总结与研究记忆沉淀 - 实验记录与周期提醒 - 多渠道消息触达与自动化触发 - Agent 运行时：Scholar 助手与工具/技能编排 - 控制面：状态、会话、cron、自动化任务可观测 - 频道层：控制台 + 外部 IM 渠道 - 目录模型：本地工作目录 + 独立密钥目录 bash researchclaw init --defaults --accept-security researchclaw models config researchclaw app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8088 启动后访问 http://127.0.0.1:8088。 - 快速开始 - 部署指南 - 配置与工作目录

title: MCP (Model Context Protocol)
excerpt: ResearchClaw supports MCP clients so the agent can use external tools and data services. MCP client definitions are stored in ~/.researchclaw/config.json under mcp.clients. json { "mcp": { "clients": { "local-tools": { "name": "Local Tools", "enabled": true, "transport": "stdio", "command": "python", "args": ["/opt/mcp/server.py"], "env": { "APIKEY": "xxx" } }, "http-tools": { "name": "HTTP Tools", "enabled": true, "transport": "streamablehttp", "url": "http://127.0.0.1:3000" } } } } - stdio - streamablehttp (also accepts http alias) - sse - MCP services are deployed separately from ResearchClaw. - When MCP config changes, runtime clients are hot-reloaded. - Keep MCP credentials in secret env vars where possible.

title: MCP (Model Context Protocol)
excerpt: ResearchClaw 支持 MCP 客户端接入，使 Agent 可以调用外部工具与数据服务。 MCP 客户端定义位于 ~/.researchclaw/config.json 的 mcp.clients 字段。 json { "mcp": { "clients": { "local-tools": { "name": "Local Tools", "enabled": true, "transport": "stdio", "command": "python", "args": ["/opt/mcp/server.py"], "env": { "APIKEY": "xxx" } }, "http-tools": { "name": "HTTP Tools", "enabled": true, "transport": "streamablehttp", "url": "http://127.0.0.1:3000" } } } } - stdio - streamablehttp（兼容 http 别名） - sse - MCP 服务需要独立部署，不与 ResearchClaw 进程绑定。 - MCP 配置更新后，运行时客户端会热重载。 - 建议将 MCP 凭证放到密钥环境变量中管理。

title: Memory System
excerpt: ResearchClaw's Memory system manages conversation history and context, ensuring the AI assistant understands conversational continuity. Every conversation is recorded in Memory. When a new message arrives, the system loads relevant history as context to help the model understand and respond better. Messages are stored in the memory/ folder under the working directory, organized by session ID: working/ └── memory/ ├── session001.json ├── session002.json └── ... Due to LLM context window limitations, the Memory system automatically manages message truncation and compression. Related: - Compact — Conversation compression - Commands — Memory management commands

title: Memory 记忆系统
excerpt: ResearchClaw 的 Memory 系统管理对话历史和上下文信息，确保 AI 助手能够理解对话的连续性。 每次对话都会被记录到 Memory 中。当新消息到来时，系统会加载相关的历史消息作为上下文，帮助模型更好地理解和回答。 对话消息存储在工作目录的 memory/ 文件夹中，按会话 ID 组织： working/ └── memory/ ├── session001.json ├── session002.json └── ... 由于 LLM 的上下文窗口有限，Memory 系统会自动管理消息的截取和压缩。 相关功能： - Compact 压缩 — 对话压缩机制 - 命令系统 — 管理 Memory 的命令

title: Quick Start

headings.text: Option 1: Install from source (recommended for contributors)

excerpt: - Python 3.10+ - pip or uv bash git clone https://github.com/ymx10086/ResearchClaw.git cd ResearchClaw pip install -e ".[dev]" bash pip install researchclaw bash researchclaw init --defaults --accept-security This creates your working directory at ~/.researchclaw by default. bash researchclaw models config researchclaw models add openai --type openai --model gpt-4o --api-key sk-... The first provider added via CLI is activated automatically. bash researchclaw app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8088 Visit http://127.0.0.1:8088. If you want server deployment (Docker/systemd/Nginx), see Deployment. - Console — UI overview and operations - Channels — multi-channel setup - Config & Working Dir — files, env vars, and persistence

title: 快速开始

headings.text: 方式一：从源码安装（适合贡献者，推荐）
headings.id: 方式一从源码安装适合贡献者推荐

excerpt: - Python 3.10+ - pip 或 uv bash git clone https://github.com/ymx10086/ResearchClaw.git cd ResearchClaw pip install -e ".[dev]" bash pip install researchclaw bash researchclaw init --defaults --accept-security 默认会创建 ~/.researchclaw。 bash researchclaw models config researchclaw models add openai --type openai --model gpt-4o --api-key sk-... 首次通过 CLI 添加的 provider 会自动激活。 bash researchclaw app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8088 访问 http://127.0.0.1:8088。 如需服务器部署（Docker / systemd / Nginx），请看 部署指南。 - 控制台 — UI 能力与操作入口 - 频道配置 — 多渠道接入 - 配置与工作目录 — 文件、环境变量与持久化

title: Skills
excerpt: Skills are ResearchClaw's extensible capability system, providing the AI assistant with specialized research abilities. ResearchClaw includes several research-related skills: - Paper Search: Search papers on ArXiv, Semantic Scholar, and more - Paper Tracking: Periodically track new papers in specified fields or keywords - Reference Management: Manage BibTeX files, generate citations - Weather: Check weather info (daily utility) Each Skill is an independent Python module: myskill/ ├── init.py ├── skill.json Skill metadata ├── handler.py Main logic └── requirements.txt Dependencies (optional) json { "name": "myskill", "version": "1.0.0", "description": "A custom research skill", "author": "Your Name", "tags": ["research", "papers"] } Send in chat: Install skill https://github.com/user/repo P

title: Skills
excerpt: Skills 是 ResearchClaw 的可扩展技能系统，为 AI 助手提供专业的科研能力。 ResearchClaw 内置了多种科研相关技能： - 论文搜索：在 ArXiv、Semantic Scholar 等平台搜索论文 - 论文追踪：定期追踪指定领域或关键词的最新论文 - 文献管理：管理 BibTeX 文件、生成引用 - 天气查询：查询天气信息（日常辅助） 每个 Skill 是一个独立的 Python 模块，包含： myskill/ ├── init.py ├── skill.json 技能元信息 ├── handler.py 主逻辑 └── requirements.txt 依赖（可选） json { "name": "myskill", "version": "1.0.0", "description": "A custom research skill", "author": "Your Name", "tags": ["research", "papers"] } 在对话中发送： 安装 skill https://github.com/user/repo 将 Skill 文件夹放入工作目录的 skills/ 文件夹中。 Skills 支持 Cron 定时任务： python { "cron": "0 9 ", 每天早上 9 点执行 "cronprompt": "搜索昨天发布的 LLM Agent 相关论文" } 参考 CONTRIBUTING 了解如何开发自定义 Skill。
